goal: 更新 AGENTS.md 约定后续小步提交

summary.title: 合并 Catty 全部分支并清理临时工作区
summary.what: 将 catty 分支上的 Catty v0/runtime/UI/docs 工作、AGENTS/CLAUDE 协作规则收口，以及 codex/catty-macos-app 临时 worktree 中的 macOS App 产品界面修正全部合并进 main；随后移除临时 worktree，并删除已合入 main 的本地 catty 与 codex/catty-macos-app 分支。
summary.why: 用户明确要求无论哪个 worktree 或分支都必须合并回 main，并清理 worktree；本次按这一边界把所有本地 Catty 工作统一收到主分支。
summary.user_goal: 更新 AGENTS.md 约定后续小步提交

decisions.chose: 将 catty 和 codex/catty-macos-app 的本地提交全部纳入 main。
decisions.rationale: 用户明确纠正为全部合并回 main，不再保留分支隔离。

decisions.chose: 先保留已形成的小步提交，再通过 merge commit 汇总进入 main。
decisions.rationale: 既满足 AGENTS.md 中后续小步提交规则，也满足本轮全部进入 main 的交付要求。

decisions.chose: 移除临时 app worktree，并在确认两个本地分支均已是 main 祖先后删除本地分支。
decisions.rationale: 避免丢失改动，同时让本机只剩 main 工作区。

rejected.alternative: 只合并 catty，保留 macOS App 临时 worktree
rejected.reason: 用户明确说无论哪个都要合并回 main。

rejected.alternative: 把 AGENTS.md 规则改动单独停下等待下一轮
rejected.reason: 用户要求一起收口，因此规则改动随本轮进入 main。

review_notes: 合并后验证：git diff --check 通过。
合并后验证：bun test 101 pass, 0 fail。
合并后验证：apps/catty-macos 下 swift build 通过。
清理后 git worktree list 只剩 /Users/envvar/work/repos/agent-memory 的 main worktree。
本地 main 当前 ahead origin/main 56；本轮未 push。

architectural_claims: Catty is now represented in main as a product thesis plus v0/runtime slices rather than the older generic memory layer framing.
The macOS app prototype is present as an independent SwiftUI/AppKit product surface under apps/catty-macos.
Local branch/worktree cleanup leaves main as the only active worktree.
behavioral_changes: Catty v0 prediction, judge, report, canary, accepted-memory, dogfood-health, and ops-runtime paths from catty are now available on main.
The macOS app primary surface now follows the original Catty today/spark/ASK product face and hides implementation/status context from the main UI.
AGENTS.md now records that future AGENTS/rules/collaboration updates should be committed in small focused commits.

api_changes.signature: Catty v0 runtime and dogfood CLIs under src/catty/*.ts

data_model_changes.name: Catty SQLite store and canary/accepted-memory tables
data_model_changes.migration_notes: Existing tests exercise side-effect-free empty-store behavior and explicit write paths.

security_implications: macOS app bridge keeps main product surface free of token/config/payload display; runtime secrets remain outside visible UI.
AGENTS.md keeps secret-boundary guidance for ~/.agents/memory/config.json and similar credentials.
migration_notes: ui/app.css and ui/app.js are now under ui/legacy; Catty product static surface remains under ui/index.html, ui/catty.css, and ui/catty.js.
main has a merge commit containing all local catty and app work; local feature branches were deleted after merge.
